files.category_change_summary.json: Category/sub-category improvement counts and affected vendors/platforms.
files.contributor_summary.json: Contributor-class activity and score delta summary.
files.current_vendor_scores.json: Current weighted score per vendor and platform using Tools/compare.py.
files.data/raw/github/pr_commits.jsonl: Raw PR commit metadata cache used for commit-to-PR association when GitHub API enrichment is available.
files.direct_commit_summary.json: Direct commit summary for commits not associated with a PR.
files.manual_review_items.json: Warnings and ambiguous changes requiring human review.
files.open_pr_proposed_changes.json: Open pull request proposed cell changes, excluded from accepted statistics.
files.run_metadata.json: Generation run metadata, counts, versioning, and warnings.
files.telemetry_change_events.csv: CSV projection of the event ledger when --format includes csv.
files.telemetry_change_events.jsonl: One changed telemetry cell per line with score delta, quality delta, provenance, and classification.
files.vendor_score_timeseries.json: Cumulative score points by vendor/platform over accepted history.
